notes: Day, busy street, with a scripted walker leaving on the boresight corridor.
All times are seconds from the first frame of the fixture.
Walker trajectory r = -13.8 + 1.635*t (m), az 0..3 deg; truth segment covers t=10..195 (r 2.6->305).
truth_complete=false: the street is full of real vehicles and pedestrians that are NOT in truth - ghost counts on this fixture are upper bounds, only walker coverage is meaningful.
